HomePage.title: Integrated Healthcare Group
HomePage.subtitle: Comprehensive psychiatric care focused on clinical stability, functional recovery, and long-term quality of life.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be a trusted center of excellence in comprehensive psychiatry.

items.1: Comprehensive psychiatric evaluations and DSM-5-TR aligned diagnostic reassessments.
items.2: Evidence-based psychopharmacologic management with ongoing response and safety monitoring.
items.3: Psychotherapeutic and psychosocial interventions delivered directly or through coordinated referrals.
items.4: Care coordination across primary care, hospitals, therapists, and community programs.
items.5: Management of complex and high-acuity psychiatric populations.
items.6: Relapse prevention, clinical stabilization, and functional rehabilitation planning.
items.7: Ethics, quality improvement, and outcomes-oriented continuous care.

1.author: Google Review
1.text: Excellent and compassionate care. The team takes time to listen and explain every treatment step clearly.

2.author: Google Review
2.text: Very professional staff, easy scheduling, and consistent follow-up. I felt supported from the first visit.

3.author: Google Review
3.text: Amazing care. The team is kind, patient, and genuinely committed to each person's emotional well-being.

4.author: Google Review
4.text: The provider was kind, knowledgeable, and helped me find a treatment plan that finally worked for me.

5.author: Google Review
5.text: I highly recommend this clinic. They are bilingual, punctual, and very human throughout the process.

6.author: Google Review
6.text: Great experience overall. Communication is quick, appointments are organized, and care feels personalized.
